alerts.header: Starting June 8, Route 49 stop changes between Wallace St and Boundary Rd will improve reliability. Alternate stops are generally within a block. New eastbound stop at 49th Ave & Wiltshire St. Check your stop before travel. More info: translink.ca/route49
alerts.desc: Please check your usual stop before travelling, as some stops shared with Routes 41 and 26 may also be affected.
